document.title: DELINERY SPECIFICATION SHEET (REQUESTED APPROVAL)
document.documentType: FPCB delivery specification sheet and Q.C flow chart

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval-oriented FPCB specification sheet for BLUE_1417 MAIN FLEX_V0.3 with layer stack, material specifications, plating requirements, and Q.C process flow.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a requested approval and manufacturing/quality-control reference for the BLUE_1417 MAIN FLEX_V0.3 FPCB.
keyPoints: The product type is FPCB and the model name is BLUE_1417 MAIN FLEX_V0.3.
The FPCB specification states 2Layer Fpcb construction.
Material specifications include Hanwha FCCL, Hanwha yellow coverlay, 3M #467 tape, Hanwha stiffener, Seoul chem marking ink, copper plating, and ENIG gold plating.
The Q.C flow chart covers processes from raw material incoming inspection through shipment inspection.

evidence.claim: The document is a requested approval delivery specification sheet.
The document date shown on the specification sheet is 2025. 03. 26.
The model name is BLUE_1417 MAIN FLEX_V0.3.
The FCCL material is Hanwha 1mil 1/2oz E.D double-sided material.
The yellow coverlay material is Hanwha 1mil with 30㎛ adhesive.
The tape material is 3M #467 with 50㎛ adhesive.
Copper plating is specified as minimum 10~12㎛.
Gold plating is specified as ENIG Ni 1~7㎛ and Au minimum 0.03㎛.
The Q.C flow chart document number is IO-Q4-119(REV.0).
The Q.C flow chart revision date is 2011.05.17.
The Q.C flow chart identifies the product name as FPCB and the form as Double Side.
Final inspection checks product appearance, scratch, oxidation, and plating discoloration.
evidence.evidenceText: 250,,,,최종 검사 ... 외 형,,기준서에 만족할것 ... Scratch,,Cu 노출 없을것 ... 산 화,,없 을 것 ... 도금 변색,,없 을 것

evidence.claim: Shipment inspection checks model name, product appearance, plating surface, and external dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: 270,,,,출하 검사 ... 모 델 명,,"현품표, 작업지시서 참조" ... 제품 외형,,출하검사 기준서 참조 ... 도금 표면,,"산화, Scratch 없을것" ... 외형 치수,,도면 기준에 만족할것

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated; source appears to be supplier/customer manufacturing approval documentation rather than an RA authority document.
Part number field is present but blank in the source text.
No external standards are cited in the source text.
Source text has spreadsheet/OCR artifacts and typos such as 'DELINERY' and fragmented Korean table text.
Gold plating values differ by section: specification lists ENIG Ni 1~7㎛ Au Min 0.03㎛, while Q.C process lists Ni 3~5㎛ and Au 0.05㎛ 이상.
